ops.title: rpc TestPostSendFailureIsNotReplayedAndNextCallReconnects is flaky: EOF surfaces as pre-send failure
ops.premise:
Premise: since the daemonkit migration (c01d9f3 / b0b5351), the post-send-failure injection in TestPostSendFailureIsNotReplayedAndNextCallReconnects can race: the transport observes the peer EOF before the send completes, so the error classifies as 'rpc transport pre-send-failure: wire: open pre-send-failure: wire: send request: wire: read: EOF' instead of the expected post-send failure (rpc_test.go:246).

Evidence: CI run 29706685814/29706685875 on eb63b398 failed this test (meshtrust-only commit, rpc untouched); reproduced locally in the working copy under load (go test -race ./rpc/ -run TestPostSend... -count=10), then passed 3x in clean worktrees at BOTH eb63b398 and its parent 92748011, and passed 3x in the same working copy minutes later. Timing-dependent, not tree-dependent. Fix likely needs the test (or transport) to serialize send completion before injecting the close.
